specific_question: How does the sales department at Lee's Market plan to integrate the new AI forecasting tools into their work?
answer: As of November 2025, the new AI forecasting tools will be available to the sales team lead and select sales managers at Lee's Market. The AI will help them quickly get the necessary data and draft charts and short summaries based on product categories and sales parameters.
